_readme: Copy to your dataset as features.json (beside calibration.json). JSON cannot use // comments. Everything whose name starts with _ is ignored by the loader. To enable settings, copy one of the objects below to the top level (merge keys you need), or copy a single key/value and remove the leading _ from the key only.
_fields: n_features — int; ORB nfeatures / SIFT nfeatures
orb_scale_factor — float; ORB pyramid scale between levels
sift_contrast_thresh — float; SIFT DoG contrast threshold
ratio_test — float in (0,1); Lowe ratio for KNN (not used when cross_check is true)
cross_check — bool; BFMatcher cross-check instead of ratio test
